purpose: Evaluate whether causal L2 impact-absorption features improve calibrated post-latency action-value forecasts and a fixed-notional after-cost policy on the untouched seven-day cohort without treating missing exits, execution failures, leverage, or repeated test inspection as alpha.

research_basis.title: When Does Order Flow Matter? State-Dependent L2 Liquidity-State Transitions in Crypto Futures
research_basis.used_fact: Order-flow value can be asset- and liquidity-state-dependent, so the evaluation is staged by feature layer and decided per symbol with blocked chronological inference.

research_basis.title: Explainable Patterns in Cryptocurrency Microstructure
research_basis.used_fact: Spread, order-flow imbalance, depth, volatility, and execution style must be evaluated jointly; predictive importance alone does not establish executable value.

research_basis.title: Deep Limit Order Book Forecasting
research_basis.used_fact: Forecast metrics and incomplete markouts cannot substitute for complete-transaction operational evaluation.

research_basis.title: The Probability of Backtest Overfitting
research_basis.used_fact: Frozen hypotheses, bounded tuning, and untouched chronological tests are required because repeated strategy selection creates backtest overfitting.

research_basis.title: GPU SDK Correspondence and Device Targeting Table
research_basis.used_fact: LightGBM's GPU backend uses OpenCL platform and device identities and can target AMD, NVIDIA, or Intel devices when the corresponding runtime is available.

research_basis.title: CFTC Orders New York Trader to Pay $200,000 for Spoofing
research_basis.used_fact: Displayed liquidity can include orders intended for cancellation, so aggregate L2 depth is treated as fragile observable capacity rather than actor identity or guaranteed fill.

research_basis.title: NYSE Holidays and Trading Hours
research_basis.used_fact: Exchange-listed securities have venue-defined sessions, holidays, and early closes; those timestamps may provide context but cannot create a close in continuous crypto markets.

market_and_calendar_scope.utc_day_use: statistical splitting, block resampling, and reporting only
market_and_calendar_scope.listed_etf_etp_equity_or_futures_session: only from a timestamped authoritative venue calendar and a separately frozen causal feature contract

population_and_roles.population: every feature-only selected anchor in the sealed v2 cohort
population_and_roles.test_reuse_after_first_read: The observed seven-day study becomes development-only and cannot be relabeled as a fresh test.

primary_action_value_target.binary_target: positive_net_payoff after the frozen 12 bps reserve
primary_action_value_target.continuous_target: net_payoff_bps after the frozen 12 bps reserve
primary_action_value_target.action_alignment: For a candidate action, multiply direction-sensitive signed inputs by +1 for long and -1 for short; preserve unsigned state inputs and add an explicit action-side indicator.

experimental_right_censoring.policy: Remove before fitting, thresholding, or scoring using only the sealed source-run coverage bound and requested exit time; report counts by role symbol and scenario.

pre_entry_safety_abort.operational_semantics: The candidate action is aborted before capital is deployed because the frozen order-time safety revalidation fails.

post_entry_unresolved_risk.operational_semantics: Capital was notionally deployed but the evidence cannot establish a complete controlled exit under the frozen mechanics.

feature_layers.shallow_control: fixed shallow LightGBM on the same L1 and tape features
feature_layers.impact_absorption_model: same LightGBM plus causal depth consumption replenishment removal fragility and recovery features
feature_layers.impact_absorption_primary_comparison: impact absorption versus L2 state on identical rows targets splits preprocessing and model capacity
feature_layers.displayed_depth_interpretation: observable and cancellable displayed capacity with persistence and removal-fragility features, never guaranteed liquidity

preprocessing_and_fit.feature_scaler: training-role median and interquartile range for the linear control only
preprocessing_and_fit.zero_iqr_policy: drop the feature from every split and record it before target access
preprocessing_and_fit.tree_missing_value_policy: no implicit missing values; causal age and availability indicators remain explicit features

predictive_evaluation.paired_block_unit: UTC day plus integrity segment plus anchor identity
predictive_evaluation.inference: paired blocked sign permutation and block bootstrap
predictive_evaluation.multiple_testing: Benjamini-Hochberg false discovery rate across symbol scenario target and primary loss

tuning_only_action_rule.model_family: best predictively admissible staged model; test economic outcomes cannot select the family
tuning_only_action_rule.threshold_objective: maximum day-and-segment blocked bootstrap lower 95 percent bound of after-cost net expectancy
tuning_only_action_rule.threshold_tie_break: higher threshold then lower completed trade count
tuning_only_action_rule.no_admissible_threshold_policy: freeze no-trade and fail the economic activity gate
tuning_only_action_rule.candidate_side_choice: Among long and short candidates passing the frozen probability threshold and positive predicted net-payoff requirement, choose the side with greater predicted net bps.

portfolio_simulation.transaction_ordering_tie_break: anchor wall time then run id then anchor index then symbol

reported_metrics: mean win and mean loss bps

pre_test_artifacts_hash_bound: fitted model bytes and best iterations
test_access_and_publication.seven_day_result_language: viability evidence only, never production readiness or durable profitability

ai_and_promotion_gate.ai_challenger_open_condition: At least two symbols independently pass the shallow predictive and economic gates on a separately sealed minimum 30-day promotion cohort.

fail_closed_conditions: feature target role or source hash mismatch
test read before preprocessing model and action artifacts are sealed
nonfinite feature prediction target or metric
test-driven model threshold feature or policy change
backend-dependent rows features targets or model capacity
profitability leverage AI or trading claim not authorized by every prior gate
